name: e2e-v2-task-parallel
description: Run a minimal v2 stage-first flow with one task stage followed by a parallel stage.

stages.prompt: Reply exactly E2E_V2_FIRST_OK and do not inspect or modify files.

tasks.prompt: Reply exactly E2E_V2_PARALLEL_A_OK and do not inspect or modify files.
Reply exactly E2E_V2_PARALLEL_B_OK and do not inspect or modify files.
